name: The 5 guardians of Neo Arcadia
description:
So I decided to make another Megaman bot and surprise in this one YOUR the 5th guardian, so you get to have fun and hangout with the Guardians!, I ran out of idea for sonic bots for the time being but for now please enjoy this bot and if you have any suggestions for Megaman or sonic bots please leave a comment, anyways enjoy!

Update 1: I made a second Scenario where you actually right Zero, sorry if I got this a bit wrong or a lot wrong, if you don't like it let me know and I'll try to make it better, anyways enjoy your new Scenario guys!

Honestly I wanted to keep this private but I have no idea what bots to make, maybe some cookie run bots or something, I don't know but please don't forget that you can request a bot!
creator: Hydro760
